sglang.title: Fix bench_serving flush cache not recognizing OPENAI_API_KEY
sglang.author: brighill
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In bench_serving.py, the /flush_cache request is missing the Authorization header. As a result, when the sglang server is started with the --api-key option, the cache is not cleared. Instead, the sglang server logs the message: POST /flush_cache HTTP/1.1" 401 Unauthorized.
Modifications
A

sglang.title: Refactor Dockerfile: unify CUDA logic and reduce image size by ~2.6 GB
sglang.author: kebe7jun
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR refactors the Dockerfile to unify the handling of various CUDA versions into a more concise approach. Additionally, it removes redundant layers and streamlines installations, resulting in a reduced final Docker image size by approximately 2.6 GB.

Consolidated mult

vllm.title: [Build/BugFix] Fix hopper 12.8 build
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix missing symbol when building with 12.8 on Hopper (bug introduced in #13798)

vllm.title: Add RLHF document
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Adds a documentation on RLHF which we can then add more to later.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Use a fixed seed to avoid flaky tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Tool use and entrypoint tests have been flaky since #14274. This PR fixes the seed to 0 for those tests.

vllm.title: [V1] TPU - Add tensor parallel support via Ray
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds tensor-parallel support to [V1] TPU via Ray executor without changing the SMPD and Ray compile flags that are used for the NVIDIA codepath. As a result, NVIDIA's Ray executor is mostly reused for the TPU codepath. Verified correctness via:
VLLM_USE_V1=1 pytest -s -v tests/entrypoints/ll

vllm.title: [VLM] Add TP support for Phi-4-MM
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add TP support for Phi-4-MM
Remove unused training functions like gradient checkpointing
Remove siglip vit copy

vllm.title: [Misc] add `use_tqdm_on_load` to reduce logs
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reduce the amount of logs by allowing users to disable these TQDM via an envvar
cc @DarkLight1337
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham contact@aarnphm.xyz

vllm.title: [V1][Core] Fix memory issue with logits & sampling
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reopened from accidentally merged #13721
This PR is a followup to #13594 (comment) that describes the memory issue during online serving even after sampler profiling is added to profile_run. After some investigation, the root cause is memory fragmentation issue of logits and other related sampling t

vllm.title: [benchmarks] Add option to use unique jsonschema for each request
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This change adds a json-unique dataset that ensures that the
jsonschema we use for each request is unique. This is useful if we
want to test performance in a worst case where caching based on the
schema will not help.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [Misc] Don't run ruff at all on 3rd party libs
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, third-party libraries are ignored in pre-commit, but not when running ruff directly from command line.

vllm.title: Move requirements into their own directory
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Moves requirements-x.txt to requirements/x.txt and updates all references to requirements files.

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix accuracy issue introduced by #14384 , on main forward_native is called (due to enabled() be false in CustomOp(nn.Module) on main) the PR updated this cuda, changing the behavior slightly. We should probably investigate further to figure out why forward_native differs form forward_cuda (on an Nvi

vllm.title: [V1] Support bad_words in sampler
vllm.author: 22quinn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follows the implementation in vllm/logits_process.py
There were two choices on where to tokenise bad words and the second path was taken:

Pass both bad_words and tokenizer via requests, but realized CachedTokenizer could not be pickled
Tokenize bad words by adding SamplingParams.update_from_tokeniz

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix tqdm progress bar when SamplingParams.n > 1
vllm.author: yanyc428
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This issue occurs when SamplingParams.n > 1. In the recent changes to vLLM, the total of the progress bar was modified to self.llm_engine.get_num_unfinished_requests(), which seems to be the number of prompts multiplied by SamplingParams.n. However, the progress bar still only updates by 1 step at a

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Revert QKVCrossParallelLinear usage in Mllama to keep BNB quantization work
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Unfortunately, QKVCrossParallelLinear doesn't support quantization that needs extra weight and weight_attrs registration (#12325 (comment)) 😢
I revert the QKVCrossParallelLinear usage in mllama, and use model-level QKVCrossLinear implementation like whisper temporarily before QKVCrossParallelLinear
